name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BUG-5
title: Post-consolidation cleanup: replace Inv 6 byte-identity guard (originals deleted), fix stale comments, declare cross-feature reads in contract.md
description:
Post-consolidation audit findings for tdd-state-machine:

1. Inv 6 byte-identity-to-tdd-subagent guard is now unsatisfiable — originals were deleted in tdd-subagent slim cycle. Replace with 'present here, absent in tdd-subagent' invariant. Currently the e2e suite is red and feature's claimed tdd_state: test-green is in drift.
2. tdd-step.py:24-26 stale comment claims script lives in tdd-subagent/scripts/ — update to tdd-state-machine/scripts/.
3. test_helpers.py docstring still attributes ownership to tdd-subagent — update to tdd-state-machine.
4. feature.json:7 summary still says 'Imported from tdd-subagent; tdd-subagent slimming and build-contract.json repoint are separate cycles' — both cycles done.
5. Add cross-feature reads declaration to contract.md: tdd-step.py reads .claude/features/contract/scripts/enforcement/ and .claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts/rabbit-project.py.
6. Add invariants for _post_test_green_hooks, --spec-no-change-reason flag, rabbit-print branding contract, _ALLOWED_NEXT['test-green'] includes 'spec-update' — all locked by tests but not in spec.
7. Spec Inv 3 says mode 0755 but files are 0775 — pick one and align.
